# Code of Conduct

This project follows the Contributor Covenant approach for public collaboration.

## Our Standards

Examples of behavior that contribute to a healthy project:

- Being respectful in technical disagreement.
- Giving actionable review feedback.
- Assuming good intent while still holding a high engineering bar.
- Keeping discussion focused on reproducible facts, code, and user impact.

Examples of unacceptable behavior:

- Harassment, discrimination, or personal attacks.
- Publishing private information without permission.
- Repeatedly derailing technical discussion.
- Abusive, threatening, or hostile language.

## Scope

This policy applies in issues, pull requests, reviews, discussions, and any project-managed communication channels.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove content, lock discussions, or block contributors whose behavior makes the project unsafe or unproductive.

If you experience or witness unacceptable behavior, contact the maintainers through the repository owners or moderation contacts.

## Attribution

This document is adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/).
